compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Summary
The reconciler preflight (`preflight_status_mapping`, `reconcile.py`) raises
`StatusMappingError("local status {status!r} not in local_to_jira_status mapping ...")`.
But the same function's Bug-85a1 logic deliberately accepts a value that is EITHER a
local-status KEY or a Jira-status VALUE, failing only when it is in neither. So the
offending value is frequently a **Jira** workflow status (e.g. `IDEA`, added Jira-side),
not a local status. Labeling it "local status 'IDEA'" is misleading and misdirects
debugging toward a non-existent local `idea` ticket. The `StatusMappingError` docstring
(reconcile.py) makes the same wrong "references a local status" assumption.

## Reproduction Steps
1. A Jira issue is in a workflow status with no reconciler mapping (e.g. `IDEA`).
2. Reconcile â†’ `ERROR: ... local status 'IDEA' not in local_to_jira_status mapping (target=REB-716)`.

Expected: message accurately states the status is unmapped in `local_to_jira_status`
in EITHER direction (could be a local-status key or a Jira-status value) â€” not that it
is a "local status".
Actual: message asserts it is a "local status", which is false for a Jira-origin status.

## Scope
LOGGING/ERROR-MESSAGE FIX ONLY. Does NOT add the `idea`->`IDEA` mapping (that is story
6173 / tawny-herb-bug, out of scope here).
- `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/reconcile.py` â€” the `StatusMappingError` message +
  the `StatusMappingError` / `preflight_status_mapping` docstrings.
- `tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/conflict/test_status_preflight.py` â€” assert the message.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The `StatusMappingError` message no longer calls the value a "local status"; it
      states the status is not mapped in `local_to_jira_status` (neither a local-status
      key nor a Jira-status value), and still includes the status value + target.
- [ ] The `StatusMappingError` and `preflight_status_mapping` docstrings no longer assert
      the value is a "local status".
- [ ] A test asserts an unmapped Jira status (e.g. `IDEA`) is not reported as a "local
      status" and the message acknowledges the Jira-status possibility.
- [ ] No mapping/behavior change (the raise condition is unchanged); existing preflight
      tests still pass.
- [ ] make lint passes for the changed files.
compiled_state.title: reconciler preflight mislabels an unmapped Jira status as a 'local status'
